prediction.reasoning: For a 2-day prediction of ZTS stock, I applied a random walk model with historical volatility estimates typical for large-cap pharmaceutical stocks (~1.2% daily volatility). The point estimate assumes no drift over the short 2-day period. Confidence intervals are based on normal distribution assumptions with volatility scaled by sqrt(2) for the 2-day timeframe, using standard z-scores: 50% CI (±0.67σ), 80% CI (±1.28σ), 90% CI (±1.65σ).
